name: Release Notes v3.8.0 - Franchise Connect
body:
Release Notes v3.8.0 - Franchise Connect

Release version: 3.8.0 | Release Date: 18 September 2019

Below is a list of resolutions included in the latest Maintenance Release. Click here to view all Franchise Connect Release Notes. 

AreaDetails
Customers


Reporting data upload to Franchise Connect was failing where customer names exceeded the limit, this has now been fixed
